query.value:
select
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='end_date_override' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_adgroup_edw_web_load_EDL')as end_date_override,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='begin_date_override' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_adgroup_edw_web_load_EDL')as begin_date_override,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Tgt_Database' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Tgt_Database,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Tgt_Schema' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Tgt_Schema,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Tgt_Table2' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Tgt_Table2,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Tgt_Table1' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Tgt_Table1,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='SrcContainer' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as SrcContainer,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='SrcFilePath' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as SrcFilePath,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='ArchiveContainer' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as ArchiveContainer,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='ArchiveFilePath' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as ArchiveFilePath,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='SinkContainer' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as SinkContainer,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='SinkFIlePath' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as SinkFIlePath,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='DummySrcPath' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as DummySrcPath,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='DF_Recon' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as DF_Recon,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Dummyfile' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Dummyfile,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='On_Prem_Path' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as On_Prem_Path,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Pipeline_name' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Pipeline_name,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Dummy_File_Name' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Dummy_File_Name,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Dummy_Count_File_Name' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Dummy_Count_File_Name,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='File_Name' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as File_Name,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='OutputContainer' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as OutputContainer,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='OutputFilePath' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as OutputFilePath,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Output_recon_File' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Output_recon_File,
(select parameter_value from DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS where parameter_name='Source_recon_File' and pipeline_name='PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL')as Source_recon_File
select BEGIN_DATE from DATAOPS.EDW_METADATA.TD_LOAD_PARAMETERS where TABLE_NAME = 'GOOGLE_ADS_EDMUNDS_STG'

condition.value:
@if(

and(equals(activity('LKP_Fetch Param From SF Table').output.firstRow.begin_date_override, ''),
equals(activity('LKP_Fetch Param From SF Table').output.firstRow.end_date_override, '')),
and(and(and(
 or(endswith(item().name, '.txt.gz'), endswith(item().name, '.txt')),
 greater(substring(replace(replace(item().name, '.txt.gz', ''), '.txt', ''),
 sub(length(replace(replace(item().name, '.txt.gz', ''), '.txt', '')), 14), 14),formatDateTime(activity('LKP_Fatch Param From TD_Load Table').output.firstRow.BEGIN_DATE,'yyyyMMdd'))),
 lessOrEquals(substring(replace(replace(item().name, '.txt.gz', ''), '.txt', ''),
 sub(length(replace(replace(item().name, '.txt.gz', ''), '.txt', '')), 14), 14),formatDateTime(variables('Sysdate'),'yyyyMMdd')))
 ,startswith(item().name, 'edmunds_daily_pricing')
),
and(and(and(
 or(endswith(item().name, '.txt.gz'), endswith(item().name, '.txt')),
 greater(substring(replace(replace(item().name, '.txt.gz', ''), '.txt', ''),
 sub(length(replace(replace(item().name, '.txt.gz', ''), '.txt', '')), 14), 14),formatDateTime(activity('LKP_Fetch Param From SF Table').output.firstRow.begin_date_override,'yyyyMMdd'))),
 lessOrEquals(substring(replace(replace(item().name, '.txt.gz', ''), '.txt', ''),
 sub(length(replace(replace(item().name, '.txt.gz', ''), '.txt', '')), 14), 14),formatDateTime(activity('LKP_Fetch Param From SF Table').output.firstRow.end_date_override,'yyyyMMdd')))
 ,startswith(item().name, 'edmunds_daily_pricing')
)
)

expression.value:
@and(equals(activity('LKP_Fetch Param From SF Table').output.firstRow.begin_date_override, ''),
equals(activity('LKP_Fetch Param From SF Table').output.firstRow.end_date_override, ''))

ifFalseActivities.name: SCR_update last run date SF Parameters

text.value:
update DATAOPS.METADATA_CONTROLS.SF_PARAMETERS
SET parameter_value = ''
where pipeline_name = 'PPL_google_ads_edw_web_load_EDL' and dataflow_name='DF_google_ads_edmunds_edw_web_load_EDL' and  (parameter_name = 'end_date_override' or  parameter_name = 'begin_date_override')

ifFalseActivities.name: SCR_update last run date TD load_copy1

dependsOn.activity: SCR_update last run date SF Parameters

text.value:
update DATAOPS.EDW_METADATA.TD_LOAD_PARAMETERS
set begin_date= current_timestamp
where TABLE_NAME='GOOGLE_ADS_EDMUNDS_STG'

ifTrueActivities.name: SCR_update last run date TD load

text.value:
update DATAOPS.EDW_METADATA.TD_LOAD_PARAMETERS
set begin_date= current_timestamp
where TABLE_NAME='GOOGLE_ADS_EDMUNDS_STG'
